div.h1: Key Remapping: Mod Hashing vs Consistent Hashing

p.strong: Adding one node to a 4-node cluster

div.h2: What happens when 80% of your cache invalidates?

td.strong: Mod hashing causes a thundering herd that can crash your database.

div.p: node = hash(key) % N Adding 5th node: hash % 4 != hash % 5 4/5 of keys change node!
node = first_node_clockwise(hash(key)) Adding 5th node: Only keys in N5 arc move Only 1/N of keys change!
